options.name: -eco_object_dir
options.description: specifies the directory in which eco objects for each partition will be created. The eco objects are saved in sub-directories, one for each partition. Default: ./eco_object_dir

options.name: -eco_tag
options.description: specfies tag name where ECO file will be saved. Default tag name is eco_object_dir

options.name: -gen_script_only
options.description: generates tcl command file but does not execute it

options.name: -original_dir
options.description: specifies the directory in which original partition sub-directories are present

options.name: -original_tag
options.description: specifies tag name where original partition pnr model is present

options.name: -ptn_net_dir
options.description: specifies the directory in which net file (i.e., nets to be DEF eco'ed) for each partition are present

options.name: -ptns
options.description: specifies the list of partition names, for which eco's are to be created

options.name: -pushdown_dir
options.description: specifies the directory in which push down (say, clock tree constructed) version of partition sub-directories are present. These partitions will be compared with respective original partitions, and eco's will be generated for each of them

options.name: -pushdown_tag
options.description: specifies tag name of the pnr model in which contains pushed down data (i.e clock or feedthrough)
